name: Creole Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix eggs (2), milk (1 1/2 c), and melted vegetable shortening (3/4 c).
2. In another bowl, combine chopped bell pepper (2 tb), onion (2 tb), pimiento (2 tb), grated American cheese (3/4 c), grated Cheddar cheese with milk (3/4 c), all-purpose flour (2 1/2 c), salt (1 ts), baking powder (2 tb), and sugar (2 tb).
3. Add the milk mixture to the dry ingredients and stir just until combined, leaving some lumps.
4. Pour the batter into greased muffin cups.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until cooked through.
